src: A lavender-painted gnome with a pointy hat, smiling face, prominent nose, and detailed beard. It wears a simple coat and boots, with hands behind its back, standing upright.
edit: A colorful, animated gnome with a pointy hat, expressive eyes, and a highly detailed beard. It wears a vibrant coat and polished boots, exuding a playful, animated charm.

per_image_non_shared_src.0: The object stands upright on a wooden tabletop with its head tilted slightly upwards. The background is a simple gray wall with no additional objects visible.
per_image_non_shared_src.1: The object stands upright on a window ledge in natural light, overlooking a cloudy sky and distant greenery. The window frame is visible, providing an open view to the outside.
per_image_non_shared_src.2: The object is centrally positioned in an overhead view on a wooden surface, capturing its details from above. The surroundings include a light wood-grain texture with no additional objects.
per_image_non_shared_src.3: The object is positioned upright on a wooden tabletop against a blank wall. The wooden surface shows a consistent grain, with no other objects present, giving a minimalist look.
per_image_non_shared_src.4: The object stands centered on a white countertop, surrounded by kitchen elements like a silver faucet and a few scattered keys, under soft indoor lighting.

per_image_non_shared_edit.0: The object stands upright on a vibrant, digitally animated wooden tabletop, with its head tilted slightly upwards. The Pixar-style scene features a stylized background and whimsical elements.
per_image_non_shared_edit.1: The object stands upright on a window ledge in a Pixar-style world, overlooking a dynamically animated sky with distant, fantastical greenery. The window frame blends into the stylized setting.
per_image_non_shared_edit.2: The object is centrally positioned in an overhead view on a Pixar-inspired wooden surface, capturing its animated details from above. The digital surroundings have a lively, stylized texture.
per_image_non_shared_edit.3: The object is positioned upright on a Pixar-style wooden tabletop against a vividly animated wall. The wooden surface includes colorful patterns and whimsical animated effects.
per_image_non_shared_edit.4: The object stands centered on a digitally animated countertop, surrounded by Pixar-style kitchen elements like a shiny faucet and stylized keys, under dynamic indoor lighting.
